member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Cables.ICrossSection.RoConn
member.summary: Gets or sets the ro connection.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Cables.ICrossSection.RoLid
member.summary: Gets or sets the ro lid.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Cables.ICrossSection.RoName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the ro.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Cables.ICrossSection.XRel
member.summary: Gets or sets the x relative.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Cables.ICrossSection.YRel
member.summary: Gets or sets the y relative.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBase.ComosObject
member.summary: The connection database object which is set as wire at the connected connectors

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBase.InitWithObject(Plt.IComosDDevice)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: The connection object database object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBase.InitWithConnector(Plt.IComosDConnector)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBase.InitWithConnector2(Plt.IComosDConnector,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBase.Reset
member.summary: Resets each property to its default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseOwn.OwnCrossSection
member.summary: The connection cross-section. Either set directly here or obtained from a related wire/cable If a wire is set the value cannot be changed here.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.CrossSectionUnit
member.summary: The unit of the current cross-section

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.CrossSection
member.summary: The connection cross-section. Either set directly here or obtained from a related wire/cable If a wire is set the value cannot be changed here.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.FromConnector
member.summary: One of the (connected) connectors related with this connection object and a "Direction" set as "From"

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.ToConnector
member.summary: One of the (connected) connectors related with this connection object and a "Direction" set as "To"

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.AWGDiameterValue
member.summary: Provides calculated AWG value based on crosssection value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.AWGDiameter
member.summary: Provides string representation of AWG value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.AWGDiameterValueUnit
member.summary: Provides unit string for AWG value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.IConnectionObjectBaseInherited.AWGDiameterUnit
member.summary: Provides string representation of AWG value's unit (AWG / kcmil)

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.ICanReverseConnectionDirection
member.summary: Adds functionality to reverse the direction of a connection.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.ICanReverseConnectionDirection.ReverseConnectionDirection
member.summary: Reverses the direction of the connection the implementation represents.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.InitWithObject(Plt.IComosDDevice)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: The connection object database object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.InitWithConnector(Plt.IComosDConnector)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.InitWithConnector2(Plt.IComosDConnector,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.Label
member.summary: gets or sets the Label to the connection object comos device

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.Cable
member.summary: gets or sets the Cable, that either got set directly or indirectly via the wire property

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomation.ConnectionLengthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection length unit of this connection

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationConnector.Potential
member.summary: Gets the log. Potential of this connection.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationConnector.Signal
member.summary: Gets the Signal of this connection.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationConnector.ConnectorCategorieFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "From"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationConnector.ConnectorCategorieTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "To"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationConnector.ConnectionLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection length of this connection

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnConnectionEndTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end to" at the connection object. should return null as default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnConnectionEndFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end from" at the connection object. should return null as default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnTypeInfo
member.summary: gets or sets type info to the conneciton object should return null as default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnConnectionLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection length at the connection object should have null as default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets the label of the connection object device should return null when the device has "" set as label

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationOwn.OwnCable
member.summary: Gets or sets the cable directly to the connection object not indirectly read from the wire

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationInherited.ConnectionEndTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end to" at the connection object. Or displays the "connection end to" from the related wire.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationInherited.ConnectionEndFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end from" at the connection object. Or displays the "connection end from" from the related wire.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectAutomationInherited.TypeInfo
member.summary:
gets or sets the type info if a wire is set it will get read from the wire if no wire is set it will get read from the connection object if connection object has no value it will get read from the document
set will only set to the connecion object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithObject(Plt.IComosDDevice)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: The connection object database object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithConnector(Plt.IComosDConnector)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithConnector2(Plt.IComosDConnector,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetail.Cable
member.summary: Gets the wire.MainDevice

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetail.InitWithObject(Plt.IComosDDevice)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: The connection object database object

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetail.Earthingsystem
member.summary: Contains information if a connection object is used for "protective earthing" or "functional earthing"

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetail.HasShield(Plt.IComosDDevice@)
member.summary: Checks if the connection object has a shield assigned and yields it.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetail.IsHalfOpen(Plt.IComosDConnector@)
member.summary: Checks if the connection is half-open. Yields the closed-end connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailConnector.ConnectorEndFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the connector end (formerly wire end) from the related "From"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailConnector.ConnectorEndTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the connector end (formerly wire end) from the related "To"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailConnector.FromConnectorEndHandlingValueOfCConnector
member.summary: Gets the value of the "ConnectorEndHandling" attribute of "From" set at CConnector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailConnector.ToConnectorEndHandlingValueOfCConnector
member.summary: Gets the value of the "ConnectorEndHandling" attribute of "To" set at CConnector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailOwn.OwnWireColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the wire color at the connection object If a wire object is set, the value cannot be overwritten by this interface

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailOwn.Wire
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection object wire

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailInherited.WireColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the wire color at the connection object If a wire object is set, the value cannot be overwritten by this interface

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailInherited.BridgeType
member.summary: Gets or sets the current bridge type

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Internal.IConnectionObjectDetailInherited.IsBridge
member.summary: Resturns true if this is a bridge connection

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line color

member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line layer

member.summary: Capsols a comos color value and offers converseion to a .Net Color type Used for Identifiication of Color Values

member.summary: Comos Color Value(g/b/r)

member.summary: .Net Color object for the Comos Color Value

member.summary: The connection database object which is set as wire at the connected connectors

member.summary: The unit of the current cross-section

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectAutomation.Potential
member.summary: Gets or sets the log. Potential of this connection. Will also be set at the connected connectors. If no connection database object exists it will be created by setting this property!

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectAutomation.Signal
member.summary: Gets or sets the Signal of this connection. Will also be set at the connected connectors. If no connection database object exists it will be created by setting this property!

member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end to" at the connection object. Or displays the "connection end to" from the related wire.

member.summary: Gets the wire.MainDevice

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.ConnectorCategorieFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "From"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.ConnectorCategorieTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "To"-Connector

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithObject(Plt.IComosDDevice)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: The connection object database object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithConnector(Plt.IComosDConnector)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.InitWithConnector2(Plt.IComosDConnector,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.GraphicalPropertiesExist
member.summary: If true graphical properties were set at the connection object (except ConnectionMode)

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.Reset
member.summary: Resets each property to its default value

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.CorrespondingConnectorFrom
member.summary: returns the Main (Base) conector used by designCO ("inherit" parent of the CRConn)

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.CorrespondingConnectorTo
member.summary: returns the Main (Base) conector used by designCO ("inherit" parent of the CRConn)

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDesign.CRNetMask
member.summary: returs the netmask the connection belongs to (read from Base/CR Conns from/to)

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ComosObject
member.summary: The connection database object which is set as wire at the connected connectors

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.FromConnector
member.summary: One of the (connected) connectors related with this connection object and a "Direction" set as "From"

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ToConnector
member.summary: One of the (connected) connectors related with this connection object and a "Direction" set as "To"

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.LineColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line color

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.LineType
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line type

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.LineWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line width

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.LineLayer
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection line layer

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.CrossSection
member.summary: The connection cross-section. Either set directly here or obtained from a related wire/cable If a wire is set the value cannot be changed here.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.CrossSectionUnit
member.summary: The unit of the current cross-section

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.Wire
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection object wire

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.Signal
member.summary: Gets or sets the Signal of this connection. Will also be set at the connected connectors. If no connection database object exists it will be created by setting this property!

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection object label

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.Potential
member.summary: Gets or sets the log. Potential of this connection. Will also be set at the connected connectors. If no connection database object exists it will be created by setting this property!

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.BridgeType
member.summary: Gets or sets the current bridge type

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectorEndFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the connector end (formerly wire end) from the related "From"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectorEndTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the connector end (formerly wire end) from the related "To"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectionEndFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end from" at the connection object. Or displays the "connection end from" from the related wire.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectionEndTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "connection end to" at the connection object. Or displays the "connection end to" from the related wire.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.WireColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the wire color at the connection object If a wire object is set, the value cannot be overwritten by this interface

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.IsBridge
member.summary: Resturns true if this is a bridge connection

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectionLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection length

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectionLengthUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection length unit

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.Cable
member.summary: Gets the wire.MainDevice

member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "From"-Connector

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.ConnectorCategorieTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the categorie information of the related "To"-Connector

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor. If no connection object exists, it will be created.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.ConnectionObject.Scripting.IConnectionObjectDetail.InitWithConnector2(Plt.IComosDConnector,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.summary: Initializes the connection object interface with an existing connection database object at the given connector. Useful if it cannot be created with its constructor.
member.param: One of the (connected) connectors that might have a connection object

If "true" no connection object will be created when this interface initializes an the connector is not related with an existing connection object. This is useful when the object shall be created by modifying connection related properties. If "false" same behavior as "InitWithConnector". A connection object will be created if the connector does not have one already.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.IRoConnNet.HasText
member.summary: Indicates whether or not the connection line has a text. This affects the minimum gap between connection lines.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.IRoConnNet.GetMinimumSpace
member.summary: Calculates the minimum distance between this and other lines.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.IRoConnNet.DoNotCloseDynamics
member.summary: If "true" do not close or disconnect dynamic connections in OnDelete, create half open connections instead

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.IRoConnNet.SubType
member.summary: subType (category) of the referenced comos connectors

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Connections.IRoConnNet.RemoveConnectionFromComos(ComosWSPInterface.IWspRoConn)
member.param: the connection line from which this method has been called

member.summary: The object which caused the error

member.summary: [ERROR: Unknown property access] the sender.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Controls.IStatusItem.Description
member.summary: Get the description

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Controls.IStatusItem.TraceLevel
member.summary: Get the Trace level

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Controls.IStatusItem.Source
member.summary: Get the Source (for example text of the line)

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Controls.IStatusItem.Position
member.summary: Gets the Line Number.

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IPfdObject
member.summary: ADHAHU1, 1216675, 12.06.17: Interface representing a Pipe *OR* a Device on a PID. Common API for Pipes and Devices should be declared here!

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IPfdObject.addDataFlowBreakFlag(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Adds/attaches a "data flow break flag" to a pipe/device
member.param: LID of the break flag to add

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IPfdObject.removeDataFlowBreakFlag(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Removes a "data flow break flag" to a pipe/device
member.param: LID of the break flag to remove

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IPfdObject.getDataFlowBreakFlags
member.summary: Retrieves all attached break flags from a pipe/device

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoDeviceNet
member.summary: Never ever make this COM-Visible!!!!!

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoDeviceNet.UpdatePath(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Alternative to WSPRoDevice.UpdatePath. Extends the feature to work with an already collected list of ComosReportTexts. This is useful if you want to call UpdatePath on each RoDevice.
member.param: Expected type [IComosDOwnCollection]
Expected type [List{ComosReportText}]

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoDeviceNet.SetSwitchInOut(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disables or enables the old option "Change Direction" by given .

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoDevicePfdNet
member.summary: ADNOJO6, 18.07.2017: Added ShowInconsistencies to avoid that XDoc_Pfd must know the implementation of RoDevicePfd.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoInterchange.GetXMEContent
member.summary: append to a crp full file

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoInterchange.InitFromXMEContent(System.Object)
member.summary: init from xml

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoStatusInfo
member.summary: This Interface should be used together with the StatusManager It should simplify the handling of the StatusWindow

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoStatusInfo.UpdateStatusWindow
member.summary: shows all Warnings and Erros in the StatusWindow Note: function should only output, check should be done in the coresponding functions

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoStatusInfo.CheckForWarnings
member.summary: check for warnings Note: this function should internally detect all warnings and add them to the StatusManager
member.returns: FALSE if everything is ok, TRUE if Warnings were found

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoStatusInfo.CheckForErrors
member.summary: check for errors Note: this function should internally detect all errors and add them to the StatusManager
member.returns: FALSE = if everything is ok, TRUE = if Warnings were found

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Device.IRoStatusInfo.GetStatusInfo
member.summary: Use this to check the result of the status check functions The result can by combined in the int value esp. > 0 = no error, 1 = warnings, 2 = error, 3 = warnings + error Note: this function should be internally used by UpdateStatusWindow(), too
member.returns: 0 = everything is ok, > 0 = warnings or errors are found (may be combined int values)

member.name: T:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.Enums.StatusValue
member.summary: Defines the possible status values for an eBlock action.

member.name: F:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.Enums.StatusValue.Open
member.summary: The action is neither fully configured nor executed.

member.name: F:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.Enums.StatusValue.Processing
member.summary: The action is configured but not executed.

member.name: F:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.Enums.StatusValue.Finished
member.summary: The action is already executed.

member.name: F:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.Enums.StatusValue.Unknown
member.summary: The action status is unknown

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.eBlock.IEBlockLibCom.GetGrayboxMainDocument(Plt.IComosBaseObject)
member.summary: Searches recursivly after the MainDocument for a Document used at Graybox technique
member.param: Should be a Graybox or an Comos-Document!
member.history: created by adoeti0 10.06.2010: A2851:F18197 modified by adoeti0 11.06.2010
member.remarks: If the commited Document is part of Graybox technique and placed on an MainDocument, than the MainDocument is returned. 1.Commited Object is a Graybox 1.1: Get DocObj from Graybox if placed, call RoUtilities.GU_GetMainDocumentViaDocObj 2.ComosObject is a Document 2.1: Owner is also a Graybox, then start goon with that one 2.2: This is MainDocument Internal usage of RoUtilitie.GU_GetMainDocumentViaDocObj, if possible better use this method directly.
member.returns: null: No MainDocument found not null: The MainDocument

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Lib.IRILib.GetActualFlowDirection(Plt.IComosDConnector,Plt.IComosDConnector@)
member.summary: ADHAHU1, 1383815, 10.08.2015: Methode liefert die "tatsächliche" Fließrichtung für einen Konnektor abhängig davon, wie es wirklich eingesetzt ist, und nicht, wie das von den COMOS-Einstellungen her (Input/Output) konfiguriert ist.
member.param: Der zu untersuchende COMOS-Konnektor

Der gefundene Pipe-Konnektor, der am nächsten liegt. Wenn kein Pipe-Konnektor gefunden wird, dann wird der letzte Component-Konnektor geliefert, der sich in der Kette befindet (siehe Beschreibung des Tasks "1383815"
member.returns: "I": Tatsächliche Fließrichtung ist "Input" "O": Tatsächliche Fließrichtung ist "Output"

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.Lib.IRILib.GetNextConnectorsInFlowDirection(Plt.IComosDConnector)
member.summary: ADHAHU1, 1384000, 11.08.2015: Methode liefert die in der Fließrichtung des übergebenen Konnektors verbundenen Bauteile (-Konnektoren).
member.param: Der zu untersuchende Konnektor
member.returns: Liste der in der Fließrichtung verbundenen Bauteile

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.RFID.IRFID.IsSequentialFunctionChart2(Plt.IComosDCDevice)
member.summary: The identification of the step chain objects is done by HIERARCHICAL classification.

member.summary: Interface for the AutoConnect class.

member.summary: Automatically connects....

member.summary: Interface for the AutoLoop class.

member.summary: Sets the container.
member.param: The container.

member.summary: Sets the X doc.
member.param: The X doc.

member.name: M:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.XDoc.IAutoLoop.StartAutoLoop(REPORTLib.Object)
member.summary: Automatically places all objects connected with the StartObjs list. AutoLoopStartObject is building the StartObjs collection beginning with start object (startObject) or using general rules.
member.param: Start object for building StartObjs list, if available.

member.name: P:Comos.WSP.Interfaces.XDoc.IXDocNet.ConnectionObjectVersion
member.summary: -1: not defined 0: old connection lines 1: new connection lines
